content.text:
<user_query>
Explore the codebase at /Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing and give me:
1. The overall folder/file structure (list key files and folders)
2. What invoice-related pages and components exist
3. What UI libraries are being used (shadcn, tailwind, etc.)
4. How invoice data is structured (types/interfaces)
5. Whether there's any existing canvas or template feature
6. What the current invoice rendering/preview looks like (any PDF or print logic)
7. What database/state management is used

Be thorough and return all findings with file paths.
</user_query>

Exploring the codebase structure and invoice-related code.

[REDACTED]

input.final_summary: InvoiceFlow is a Next.js 15 GST invoicing app with Supabase Postgres, shadcn/ui, and a template editor (not a visual canvas). Invoice detail uses a hardcoded layout; PDF/print uses TemplatePreview with browser print — no server-side PDF library.

content.text:
Here is a thorough map of `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing` based on the codebase.

---

## 1. Overall Folder / File Structure

**Product:** InvoiceFlow — GST invoicing for Indian freelancers (per `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/README.md`).

### Top-level layout

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/` | Next.js 15 App Router (pages, API routes, auth) |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/` | React UI components (invoice, dashboard, templates) |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/ui/` | shadcn/ui primitives |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/lib/` | Types, DB layer, auth, utilities |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/supabase/` | SQL schema (`schema.sql`) |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/public/` | Static assets |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/scripts/` | Utility scripts (e.g. password hash) |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/Design_skill_reference/` | Design reference CSVs (not app code) |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/cursor-design-personas/` | Separate design-personas CLI package |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/base documents/` | Sample financial documents (XLS/CSV) |

### Key config files

- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/package.json`
- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components.json` (shadcn config)
- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/tsconfig.json`
- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/next.config.mjs`
- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/middleware.ts`
- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/globals.css`
- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/postcss.config.mjs`

### App routes (`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/`)

**Public / auth**
- `page.tsx` — landing
- `login/page.tsx`
- `auth/login/page.tsx`, `auth/callback/route.ts`, `auth/verify-email/page.tsx`
- `onboarding/page.tsx`
- `reset-password/page.tsx`
- `accept-invite/[token]/page.tsx`

**Dashboard** (`app/dashboard/`)
- `page.tsx` — main dashboard
- `layout.tsx` — auth guard + sidebar
- `invoices/page.tsx`, `invoices/new/page.tsx`, `invoices/[id]/page.tsx`, `invoices/[id]/pdf/page.tsx`
- `invoices/templates/page.tsx`
- `clients/`, `payments/`, `purchases/`, `reconciliation/`, `gst-report/`, `account-summary/`, `settings/`

**API routes** (`app/api/`)
- `invoices/route.ts`, `invoices/[id]/send/route.ts`
- `invoice-templates/route.ts`
- `clients/route.ts`, `payments/route.ts`, `purchases/route.ts`
- `profile/route.ts`, `gst-report/route.ts`, `gst/sync/route.ts`, `gst/credentials/route.ts`
- `bank-transactions/route.ts`, `reconcile/route.ts`, `account-summary/route.ts`
- `init-db/route.ts`, `update-db-schema/route.ts`, `update-schema-v2/route.ts`
- `import-figma-data/route.ts`, `seed-data/route.ts`
- `org/invite/route.ts`, `auth/check/route.ts`, `categorize/route.ts`

### Lib modules (`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/lib/`)

- `types.ts` — canonical TypeScript interfaces
- `db.ts` — Supabase `exec_sql` RPC query layer
- `template-defaults.ts` — template config types + presets
- `supabase-auth.ts`, `supabase-server.ts` — Supabase clients
- `check-auth.ts`, `auth.ts`, `auth-server.ts` — Stack Auth (legacy/optional)
- `get-org.ts` — org resolution for API routes
- `fetch.ts` — client API helper
- `email.ts` — Resend email service
- `gst-api.ts`, `categorize.ts`
- `utils.ts`, `utils/number-to-words.ts`

---

## 2. Invoice-Related Pages and Components

### Pages

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/dashboard/invoices/page.tsx` | Invoice list |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/dashboard/invoices/new/page.tsx` | Create invoice |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/dashboard/invoices/[id]/page.tsx` | Invoice detail |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/dashboard/invoices/[id]/pdf/page.tsx` | Print/PDF preview |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/dashboard/invoices/templates/page.tsx` | Template gallery/editor |

### Components

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/invoice-form.tsx` | Create-invoice form (GST calc, client select) |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/invoice-list.tsx` | List with status updates, mark-paid modal |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/invoice-view.tsx` | Detail view (hardcoded layout, email/print/PDF actions) |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/recent-invoices.tsx` | Dashboard widget |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/invoice-status-chart.tsx` | Recharts pie chart by status |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/template-preview.tsx` | Renders invoice from `TemplateConfig` |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/template-editor.tsx` | Template customization UI |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/template-style-panel.tsx` | Colors, fonts, layout picker |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/template-field-panel.tsx` | Toggle/show fields, custom fields |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/templates-page-client.tsx` | Template gallery + editor launcher |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/dashboard/invoices/[id]/pdf/print-button.tsx` | `window.print()` button |

### API

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/api/invoices/route.ts` | GET/POST/PUT/PATCH invoices |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/api/invoices/[id]/send/route.ts` | Email invoice to client via Resend |
| `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/api/invoice-templates/route.ts` | CRUD for saved templates |

### Related (payments, dashboard)

- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/payment-form.tsx`
- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/payment-list.tsx`
- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/revenue-chart.tsx`
- `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/dashboard-layout.tsx` (nav includes “Invoice Templates”)

---

## 3. UI Libraries

| Library | Evidence |
|---------|----------|
| **Tailwind CSS v4** | `tailwindcss` in `package.json`; `@import "tailwindcss"` in `app/globals.css` |
| **shadcn/ui (New York style)** | `components.json`; Radix primitives in `package.json`; components in `components/ui/` |
| **Radix UI** | Many `@radix-ui/react-*` deps in `package.json` |
| **Lucide React** | Icons throughout (e.g. `invoice-view.tsx`, `dashboard-layout.tsx`) |
| **Recharts** | `invoice-status-chart.tsx`, `revenue-chart.tsx` |
| **next-themes** | `components/theme-provider.tsx` |
| **react-hook-form + zod** | In `package.json` (used in some forms) |
| **class-variance-authority, clsx, tailwind-merge** | shadcn utilities in `lib/utils.ts` |
| **Geist font** | In `package.json`; also Inter/IBM Plex Serif/JetBrains Mono in `app/layout.tsx` |
| **Sonner** | Toast library in `package.json` |
| **Vaul** | Drawer component dep |
| **cmdk** | Command palette dep |

**Not present:** Chakra UI, Zustand, Framer Motion, or a dedicated PDF library (react-pdf, jsPDF, etc.).

---

## 4. Invoice Data Structure (Types / Interfaces)

### Primary types — `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/lib/types.ts`

**`Invoice`**
```typescript
{
  id, org_id, client_id, invoice_number, invoice_date,
  description, hsn_code, service_date,
  amount_before_tax, cgst_rate, sgst_rate, cgst_amount, sgst_amount, total_amount,
  terms, status: "paid" | "unpaid" | "partially_paid" | "overdue",
  payment_due_days, sent_at, created_at, updated_at,
  client?: Client
}
```

**Related types in same file:** `Profile`, `Client`, `Payment`, `BankTransaction`, `Purchase`, `Organization`, `OrgMember`.

### Template config — `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/lib/template-defaults.ts`

- `TemplateFieldConfig` — `{ show, label? }`
- `CustomField` — `{ id, label, value, show }`
- `TemplateConfig` — `templateId`, `colors`, `fonts`, `fields`, `lineItems`, `pageSize`
- Presets: `CLASSIC_TEMPLATE`, `MODERN_TEMPLATE`, `PROFESSIONAL_TEMPLATE`
